pkgmetadata.longdescription: vk_api [[PyPI](httpsimg.shields.iopypivvk_api.svg)](httpspypi.orgprojectvk_api) [Python 3.x](httpsimg.shields.iopypipyversionsvk_api.svg)vk_api Python (vk.com API wrapper) [](httpsvk-api.readthedocs.ioenlatest) [](.examples) [ Telegram](httpst.mepython273_vk_api) [ API](httpsvk.comdevmethods) [ vk_api](httpsgithub.compython273vk_apiissues356) ( )python3 -m pip install vk_apipythonimport vk_apivk_session vk_api.VkApi(+71234567890, mypassword)vk_session.auth()vk vk_session.get_api()print(vk.wall.post(messageHello world))
